description: A world record in The Ptah Protocol. The foundational record — everything else references it. A world must exist before characters, events, or lore can exist inside it.

main.description: The deed. Establishes that a world exists, who created it, and what its basic properties are. Ptah conceives the world in his heart — this record is that conception made permanent.

description.description: What kind of world this is, in plain language.

creatorDID.description: The permanent identity of whoever seeded this world. This never changes.

sourceType.description: The intellectual property origin of this world.

sourceReference.description: If sourceType is publicDomain, the specific source material this world is derived from.

canonicalStatus.description: Whether this world is open for contribution, controlled by the originator, or governed by community consensus.

governanceMode.description: The constitutional posture of the world. Signals how contributions and canon are governed before anyone contributes.

renderingHints.description: Loose metadata telling visual rendering layers what kind of world this is — tone, era, genre, aesthetic.
Visual and tonal metadata for rendering layers. The world has to feel like something before anything has happened in it yet.

tone.description: The emotional register of the world.
